figures.caption: Figure 6: Chromosomal distribution of SVs and TE-associated SVs across strains and mutagens. (A) 1013 Stacked bar plots showing the total count and types of SVs including Deletions, Insertions, 1014 Duplications, Inversions, Translocations, and Unclassified (NA) across chromosomes 1–5 and X, for 1015 each strain (AB1, CB4856, N2) and mutagen (EMS and formaldehyde). (B) TE associated SVs were 1016 primarily Deletions. 1017

Figure 7. A) Simulated populations evolving with less than 10% of individuals reproducing through 1028 outcrossing do not retain SVs. B) The mean number of structural variant mutations is lower in 1029 populations with lower quantitative levels of reproduction through outcrossing.
